scripts.test:organized: playwright test tests/ui/auth tests/ui/tasks tests/api/auth tests/integration/tasks --timeout=120000
scripts.test:smoke: playwright test tests/ui/auth tests/ui/tasks tests/api/auth tests/integration/tasks --timeout=120000 --grep @smoke
scripts.test:critical: playwright test tests/ui/auth tests/ui/tasks tests/api/auth tests/integration/tasks --timeout=120000 --grep @critical
scripts.test:regression: playwright test tests/ui/auth tests/ui/tasks tests/api/auth tests/integration/tasks --timeout=120000 --grep @regression
scripts.test:slow: playwright test tests/ui/auth tests/ui/tasks tests/api/auth tests/integration/tasks --timeout=120000 --grep @slow
